title: Publicity
headline: Publicity
subheadline: Automated public notices and resident communications powered by your data.
body: Publicity connects to your city's data and automatically generates and distributes public notices, compliance letters, and resident updates. Whether it's a code violation notice, a rental registration reminder, or a community update, Publicity ensures the right message reaches the right people at the right time.

features.title: Automated Notices
features.description: Generate violation notices, renewal reminders, and public announcements automatically from your data.

features.title: Multi-Channel Delivery
features.description: Send communications via email, SMS, postal mail, or publish to your city website.

features.title: Template Builder
features.description: Create and manage reusable templates with dynamic fields that pull from your city data.

features.title: Delivery Tracking
features.description: Track delivery status, open rates, and response rates for every communication sent.
